findings.headline: TEMPORAL LEAKAGE — training data overlaps the test period
findings.detail: 8277/8294 (99.8%) training rows are dated at/after the earliest test row. Split is not a clean time cut (train_max=1768345200 ≥ test_min=1599775200); looks like a RANDOM split masquerading as walk-forward.

findings.headline: OVERFIT RED FLAGS present
findings.detail: in-sample ROI 0.40 > 0.20 implausibility alarm; holdout ROI collapsed to -0.12; holdout collapse: ROI 0.400→-0.120 (gap +0.520 > 0.25); 677 cells scanned → ~15.6 expected false z≥2 winners

findings.headline: well calibrated — ECE 0.019 below the 0.03 material floor (HL deviation significant, p=0.00012, but immaterial at n=11849)
findings.detail: HL χ²=31.4, p=0.000117, ECE=0.019 over 10 bins
